A stunning, highly detailed digital painting of a large, vibrant butterfly hovering gracefully just above a small pink cosmos flower. The butterfly has iridescent, multicolored wings featuring a rich blend of electric blue, turquoise, magenta, hot pink, golden yellow, and orange with bold black vein patterns and scalloped edges. Its body is dark with delicate antennae and legs delicately reaching toward the flower.
The flower has soft pink petals and a bright yellow center, with a few green leaves. The scene is set over a glossy, reflective water-like surface that beautifully mirrors the butterfly and flower with colorful, painterly distortions.
Atmospheric golden-hour background with soft, dreamy bokeh in warm orange, amber, and muted teal tones. Impressionistic oil painting style with visible brush strokes, rich vibrant colors, dramatic lighting, and ethereal mood.
